overall.description: Static shot of a medieval fantasy bedroom interior featuring wooden bunk beds and dim atmospheric lighting from a stained glass window. Game engine footage with detailed texturing and moody blue-toned ambient light.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval fantasy bedroom with bunk beds

agents.ego_description: Standing completely still, observing the dimly lit bedroom interior

entered.detail: Two-level wooden bunk bed with thick support beams and railings on upper level
Simple wooden ladder leaning against the bunk bed leading to the upper level
Leaded glass window with diamond lattice pattern emitting blue moonlight
Heavy dark green curtains with gold trim hanging beside the window area
Built-in wooden bench with storage drawers underneath and cushions on top
Exposed dark wooden ceiling beams supporting the roof structure

segments.scene_description: A static view of a medieval fantasy bedroom interior dominated by a wooden bunk bed structure. The scene is dimly lit by blue moonlight filtering through a stained glass window at the far end. Heavy green curtains hang to the right while a storage bench with pillows occupies the left side. The camera remains completely stationary throughout the clip, capturing the atmospheric game environment with no movement or action occurring.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a static, atmospheric view of a medieval fantasy bedroom bathed in dim, moody lighting. It begins with a focus on a heavy wooden bunk bed structure that dominates the center of the room. As the eye wanders, the scene reveals blue moonlight filtering through a stained glass window at the far end, casting a cool glow across the interior. This light extends toward heavy green curtains on the right and a storage bench with pillows on the left, maintaining a still and silent environment throughout the sequence.
